message: Generated Wire code references TLSInsecureSkipVerify and cfg.Storage.API.TLSInsecureSkipVerify, but domain storage.APIConfig and config.APIConfig only define InsecureSkipVerify. Build, go vet, and staticcheck fail.
suggested_fix: Regenerate Wire from internal/application/container/wire.go after adding scripts/regen-wire.sh, or replace the API struct literal with InsecureSkipVerify: cfg.Storage.API.InsecureSkipVerify. Run wire locally to verify.

message: Same compile failure blocks golangci-lint typecheck and go test coverage for container and downstream packages.
suggested_fix: Same as ISSUE-001; treat as duplicate symptom of stale wire_gen.go.

message: Repository layer has no SQLite-backed integration tests; test-output.txt shows 0.0% coverage across packages and no CRUD validation against a real temp DB.
suggested_fix: Add testhelpers to open modernc.org/sqlite temp DB and repository tests for Add/Get/Update/Delete/List using NewNoteRepository + UnifiedAdapter.

message: DeleteNote duplicates identical http.StatusNotFound branches (lines 229-231 and 232-234), adding noise and cognitive load.
suggested_fix: Remove the duplicate if block; keep a single NotFound handling path.

message: NewDefaultConfig omits an explicit Storage.API block; TLS skip-verify defaults are implicit zero values only. No validation rejects user:password@ in API base URLs while TLS verification is disabled.
suggested_fix: Set explicit Storage defaults with InsecureSkipVerify false; extend ValidateConfig to reject URL userinfo on API base URL and add config unit tests.

message: HotkeyManager.Start nests channel setup and an infinite select loop with per-channel inner selects, inflating cyclomatic complexity.
suggested_fix: Extract listenChannelsForEntries(entries []HotkeyEntry) and unit-test channel slice construction without changing runtime behavior.

message: All packages report 0.0% statement coverage in the audit snapshot.
suggested_fix: Address ISSUE-003 and add targeted tests for config, API client, and pure helpers to raise baseline coverage.
